selected_ideas.name: Permission deny for generated files
selected_ideas.reason: Zero deny rules currently protect 7,731 lines of generated code. One JSON edit fixes this.

selected_ideas.name: Path-scoped rules (.claude/rules/)
selected_ideas.reason: Auto-inject contract knowledge when working on matching files. Correct 2026 pattern.

selected_ideas.name: CLAUDE.md constitution split (120-150 lines)
selected_ideas.reason: Progressive disclosure. Move domain knowledge to skills/rules. Not truncation (that's MEMORY.md).

selected_ideas.name: PreToolUse hook for generated files
selected_ideas.reason: Defense-in-depth alongside deny rules. Extend existing pre-edit.sh.

selected_ideas.name: Discovery Step 0.8 config audit
selected_ideas.reason: Check Claude Code config state before making changes.

selected_ideas.name: Validation tier split (CI vs Dev)
selected_ideas.reason: CI=validate-local ONLY. validate-live requires services. Critical for determinism.

selected_ideas.name: Stop hook for session-end validation
selected_ideas.reason: Validate once at completion, not per-edit. Replaces slow PostToolUse pattern.

selected_ideas.name: Migration safety with rollback
selected_ideas.reason: Backup before changes, incremental implementation, documented rollback.

rejected_ideas.name: PostToolUse auto-validate
rejected_ideas.reason: 5-15s per edit is too slow. 10 file edits = 50-150s overhead. Use Stop hook instead.

rejected_ideas.name: Managed settings (/etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json)
rejected_ideas.reason: Enterprise feature for org-wide policy. ZakOps is single developer. Zero benefit.

rejected_ideas.name: Dynamic context.sh
rejected_ideas.reason: Non-deterministic output. Hooks exist natively. Maintenance burden for replicating built-in.

rejected_ideas.name: DriftOps auto-commit bots
rejected_ideas.reason: Auto-commits without review amplify errors. Git lock contention. Pre-commit BLOCKS drift.

rejected_ideas.name: make auto-fix composite target
rejected_ideas.reason: Hides which sync target ran and what changed. Keep individual make sync-* targets.

rejected_ideas.name: OpenAI Evals gate
rejected_ideas.reason: Separate ecosystem, no concrete eval defined. V5's GATE 1-9 system + validate-enforcement IS the eval gate.

rejected_ideas.name: cc-hooks-ts TypeScript SDK
rejected_ideas.reason: Adds TypeScript build step. Current bash hooks work fine. Over-engineering.

rejected_ideas.name: Two-tier persistent memory via MCP
rejected_ideas.reason: Requires running MCP server (zero .mcp.json exists). MEMORY.md works. Operational complexity.

rejected_ideas.name: PostgreSQL MCP direct DB access
rejected_ideas.reason: Write risk without read-only roles. NEEDS VERIFICATION before implementing.

conflicts_resolved.resolution: Hybrid: user ~/.claude/ for global deny rules, repo .claude/ for rules/agents. Claude Code merges hierarchically.
120-150 line constitution with pointers. Not because of truncation (that's MEMORY.md) but progressive disclosure.
THREE TIERS: (1) pre-commit at git level, (2) Stop hook at session level, (3) manual validate-live for dev. Never PostToolUse.
Settings.json paths are developer-local by definition (not in CI). Use --add-dir at invocation for portability.

gates.description: CLAUDE.md < 150 lines, all refs exist, 7 surfaces documented
Permission deny rules in settings.json, generated file edit blocked
Manifest >250 lines, includes contract surfaces + config audit
validate-contract-surfaces.sh covers freshness, bridges, SDK, tsc
Dependency graph covers all 7 surfaces with CI-safe column
pre-edit.sh + stop.sh hooks, registered in settings.json
Zero hardcoded absolute paths in Makefile
validate-enforcement checks line count, rules, deny rules, sync targets
validate-local is CI-safe, validate-live is dev-only
Backup created, rollback documented, incremental order defined
